profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells automotive components and metal finishing for motorcycles and cars in Indonesia. The company offers frame body, muffler, wheel rim, steering handle, grab rail, main stand, step bar component, swing arm, arm cushion, and fastener for motorcycles and reinforcement sub assy instrument panel and beam comp steering hanger, hood lock, cross member frame, general parts, and suspension member for automobiles. It also operates advance manufacturing facility, such as integrated stamping facility; cold forging; machining; CNC/ NC bending; manual and robotic welding; robotic spot welding; and special propose machine, including finishing processes facilities, such as nickel chrome platting, acid zinc platting, spray painting with robot paint, cathode electro dipping (CED) painting, and heat treatment facility. Additionally, the company provides link assy, pipe comp exhaust assy and muffler assy, forging parts and aluminium casting component, shock absorber component, transmission handle component, plate RR cross, footrest, bar comp side stand, grabrail, mainstand, steering handle, body comp muffler and pipe comp exhaust, bracket absorber component, swing arm component, throttle and brake component, muffler comp, double seat, and crankcase. Further, it offers control cables, manufacturing supporting tools, plastic injection, electrical standard accessories, EV component and energy systems, and other related products. PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Cikarang, Indonesia.
